description: India Book III,36: Court record, or deposition of witnesses. Written on cloth by Avraham ben Yiju. Location: India, perhaps Mangalore. Dating: 1132–39 or 1145–49 CE, based on ben Yiju's years in India. The record itself is almost completely effaced. It notes that a trader presented a court record/ruling (maʿase) which had been drawn up in Bharuch (Broach), the well-known port city in northwest India. On recto there are two medical prescriptions in Arabic script. (Information from Goitein and Friedman.)
description_he: ספר הודו III,36: רשומת בית דין שנכתבה על בד על ידי אברהם בן יג'ו בהודו, כ-1132-49
